  • Methodendetails

    • testCreateWithParameters

      @DisplayName("SyxMessageTest: Create a SyxMessage with Parameter Values (for sending SysEx)") public void testCreateWithParameters() throws IllegalArgumentException, InvalidMidiDataException
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException
      InvalidMidiDataException

    • testParseData

      @DisplayName("SyxMessageTest: Create a SyxMessage by Parsing a MIDI Data Buffer (for receiving SysEx)") public void testParseData() throws IllegalArgumentException, InvalidMidiDataException
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException
      InvalidMidiDataException

    • testSerialization

      IOException
